title: net.subnet Facet
description: A network subnet, projected by MULTIPLE Sources under multi-source Facet ownership (ADR-0059/0060; ADR-0096). UNION of every Source's fields: crossplane/NetBox emit {claim,name,cidr}; awsec2 emits {cidr,availabilityZone,state,vpcId}. All optional — each Source fills what it observes; closed so drift is caught (§1.5).
